description: Optional bundled schema snapshots (hash → manifest) when a vault has no copy under db/schema_snapshots/. Most migrations rely on per-vault stamps written at connect.

snapshots.comment: pre-peers.spark_id (T0.1-core). add-only nullable column → auto lens to current; no wipe.
pre-peers.account_name (admin-spark roster, Phase A.1). add-only nullable column → auto lens; no wipe.
